name: direct-connect
title: AWS Hybrid Connectivity — Direct Connect
summary: Creates a Direct Connect gateway, optional dedicated connection order, private virtual interfaces, and VGW/TGW gateway associations with on-premises prefix filtering.

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory tags.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' tag.

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code for chargeback/showback. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' tag.

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional tags merged beneath the mandatory tag set. Mandatory tags win on key collision.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: create_connection
module.description: Whether to order a new dedicated DX connection. Set false when using an existing or hosted connection (supply existing_connection_id for private VIFs).

module.name: connection_bandwidth
module.description: Bandwidth for a new dedicated connection (1Gbps, 10Gbps, 100Gbps). Ignored when create_connection = false.

module.name: connection_location
module.description: DX location code for a new connection (e.g., 'EqDC2'). Ignored when create_connection = false.

module.name: existing_connection_id
module.description: ID of an existing DX (or hosted) connection to attach private VIFs to. Required when create_connection = false and private_vifs is non-empty.

module.name: dx_gateway_name
module.description: Name override for the Direct Connect gateway. Null derives the name from the framework naming convention.

module.name: dx_gateway_asn
module.description: Amazon-side ASN of the Direct Connect gateway (private range, must differ from on-premises ASN).

module.name: private_vifs
module.type: map(object({ vlan = number bgp_asn = number bgp_auth_key = optional(string) amazon_address = optional(string) customer_address = optional(string) mtu = optional(number, 1500) }))
module.description: Private virtual interfaces keyed by logical name, attached to the connection and the DX gateway.

module.name: gateway_associations
module.type: map(object({ type = string gateway_id = string allowed_prefixes = optional(list(string), []) }))
module.description: Associations between the DX gateway and VGWs or transit gateways, keyed by logical name. allowed_prefixes filters which VPC CIDRs are advertised on-premises (required for TGW associations).

outputs.name: gateway_id
outputs.description: ID of the Direct Connect gateway.

outputs.name: connection_ids
outputs.description: Map with key 'connection' to the DX connection ID in use (newly created or supplied).

outputs.name: vif_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical private VIF name to virtual interface ID.

outputs.name: association_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical association name to DX gateway association ID.

outputs.name: vif_bgp_auth_keys
outputs.description: Map of logical private VIF name to BGP auth key. SENSITIVE — required by the on-premises router configuration.
